commentaries.author: Cyprian of Carthage
commentaries.content:
How many there are daily who do not repent nor make confession of the consciousness of their crime, who are filled with unclean spirits!.
4. That Christ is the Hand and Arm of God.

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: So that it was not by Beelzebub that even they were casting out demons, but (as we have said) by the power of the Creator; and that He might make this understood, He adds: "But if I with the finger of God cast out demons, is not the kingdom of God come near unto you? "

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
